title: Revert business name to original generated name

requirements.text: Revert the website/business name back to the original first name that was auto-generated before any renaming occurred. Update all occurrences across the site: Navbar logo/name, Hero section headline and tagline, About section brand copy, Footer brand info, and the page title in index.html.

quotes: I want the 1st name i got

acceptanceCriteria: The Navbar displays the original first generated business name.
The Hero section headline and tagline reference the original first generated business name.
The About section brand copy uses the original first generated business name.
The Footer brand info shows the original first generated business name.
The page <title> in index.html reflects the original first generated business name.
No trace of any subsequently renamed business name remains anywhere on the site.

constraints: Do not alter the visual theme, layout, or any other content — only the business name should change.
Do not modify any files listed under frontend.immutablePaths.
nonGoals: Changing any colors, typography, or design elements.
Adding or removing any sections or features.
Modifying backend data or product names.
